title: Garden Route Badgers conduct sanitary pad run
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - As part of their social...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - As part of their social corporate responsibility, the players and coaching staff of the Garden Route Badgers professional women's team conducted a very successful sanitary pad run the past week.","html":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - As part of their social corporate responsibility, the players and coaching staff of the Garden Route Badgers professional women's team conducted a very successful sanitary pad run the past week."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The players visited Saturnus Primary School in Bridgton, Oudtshoorn, and handed out about a thousand sanitary pads."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"According to Zenobia Nel, executive assistant and human resource administrator, the project was a huge success. \"I would like to extend a special word of thanks to our loyal sponsors and donors who contributed to this annual programme,\" Nel said.","html":"According to Zenobia Nel, executive assistant and human resource administrator, the project was a huge success. \"I would like to extend a special word of thanks to our loyal sponsors and donors who contributed to this annual programme,\" Nel said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Garden Route Badgers conduct sanitary pad run
